name: Wyrmwood
description: The forest swallows the light. Gnarled trunks close in from every side, bark dark with moss and age. The trees thicken into something worse.
ambient: Something shifts in the undergrowth, just out of sight.
The trees groan faintly, though there is no wind.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
